copy.outroSubline: No keyboard · No mouse · No touchscreen

narration.label: Welcome
narration.text: LevelUp is school rewards built around students — scan in, earn points, redeem prizes.

narration.label: Kiosk sign-in
narration.text: Students sign in at the kiosk and see their points in seconds.

narration.label: ID cards
narration.text: Every student gets a digital ID card, ready to print or scan.

narration.label: Prize shop
narration.text: They pick prizes from the shop — scan to redeem.

narration.label: Scan only
narration.text: No keyboard, mouse, or touchscreen required. LevelUp runs on scans.
